name: credchain
description: CredChain — a blockchain-powered universal credential network built on Solana. Multi-service monorepo (backend, frontend, ai-cv-engine, ai-insights-engine).
author: Ebukah · Tony · Zhavia · Kuro

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.install:python: pip install -r ai-cv-engine/requirements.txt && pip install -r ai-insights-engine/requirements.txt
